title: SEC0: display name canonicalization audit passed
description:
Security correctness review of nie-5lsf completed. All checks passed:

1. All 11 bidi control codepoints (U+202A/B/C/D/E, U+2066/67/68/69, U+200E/F) present in BIDI_CONTROLS ✓
2. All 3 ZWS codepoints (U+200B, U+200C, U+2060) present in ZWS_CHARS ✓
3. U+200D (ZWJ) and U+FEFF (BOM) correctly absent per spec ✓
4. canonicalize_display_name called BEFORE storage in SET_NICKNAME handler ✓
5. canonicalize_display_name called BEFORE storage and response in GROUP_CREATE handler ✓
6. No bypass paths for display names - all user input canonicalized ✓
7. NFC normalization correct: UnicodeNormalization trait in scope, s.nfc().collect() valid ✓
8. e2e test covers both bidi rejection (U+202E) and ZWS stripping (U+200B) ✓

Files reviewed:
- /home/mark/WORK/nie/relay/src/ws.rs (canonicalize_display_name, SET_NICKNAME, GROUP_CREATE handlers)
- /home/mark/WORK/nie/relay/tests/e2e_jsonrpc.rs (display_name_canonicalization test)
- /home/mark/WORK/nie/DESIGN.md (Display Name Canonicalization spec)
close_reason: Audit complete — canonicalize_display_name passes security review. Resolved by nie-qf7k.4 and nie-qf7k.2 improvements.
